query: UPDATE feedPosts fp JOIN reviews r ON fp.reviewId = r.id SET fp.summary = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.analysisJson, '$.summary')) WHERE fp.summary IS NULL AND r.analysisJson IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute UPDATE feedPosts fp JOIN reviews r ON fp.reviewId = r.id SET fp.summary = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.analysisJson, '$.summary')) WHERE fp.summary IS NULL AND r.analysisJson IS NOT NULL;
